testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. null Host info: host: 'DIVYA', ip: '172.20.10.2'

testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. request timed out Host info: host: 'DIVYA', ip: '172.20.10.2'
